name: ERP System Dashboard
description: Professional ERP system with modules for Settings, Employees, Inventory, Purchase, Sales, and Manufacturing
logs: Created complete ERP dashboard with dark theme and sidebar navigation
Added Settings module with Users and Access Rights management
Added Employees module with employee and department management forms
Added Inventory module with Products, Stock On Hand, Stock Moves, Locations, and Warehouses
Added Purchase module with Purchase Orders and Vendors views
Added Sales module with Sales Orders and Customers views
Added Manufacturing module with Manufacturing Orders and Bill of Materials forms
Added full CRUD functionality to Customers and Vendors pages with dialog forms
Fixed MO_Copy table name to MO in manufacturing order queries
